verses.1: “Call now, is there anyone who will answer you? And to which of the holy ones will you turn?
verses.2: “For irritation kills the fool, And jealousy brings death to the simple.
verses.3: “I have seen the fool taking root, And I cursed his home immediately.
verses.4: “His sons are far from safety, They are also oppressed at the gate, And there is no one to save them.
verses.5: “The hungry devour his harvest And take it to a place of thorns, And the schemer is eager for their wealth.
verses.6: “For disaster does not come from the dust, Nor does trouble sprout from the ground,
verses.7: For man is born for trouble, As sparks fly upward.
verses.8: “But as for me, I would seek God, And I would make my plea before God,
verses.9: Who does great and unsearchable things, Wonders without number.
verses.10: “He gives rain on the earth, And sends water on the fields,
verses.11: So that He sets on high those who are lowly, And those who mourn are lifted to safety.
verses.12: “He frustrates the schemes of the shrewd, So that their hands cannot attain success.
verses.13: “He captures the wise by their own cleverness, And the advice of the cunning is quickly thwarted.
verses.14: “By day they meet with darkness, And grope at noon as in the night.
verses.15: “But He saves from the sword of their mouth, And the poor from the hand of the strong.
verses.16: “So the helpless has hope, And injustice has shut its mouth.
verses.17: “Behold, happy is the person whom God disciplines, So do not reject the discipline of the Almighty.
verses.18: “For He inflicts pain, and gives relief; He wounds, but His hands also heal.
verses.19: “In six troubles He will save you; Even in seven, evil will not touch you.
verses.20: “In famine He will redeem you from death, And in war, from the power of the sword.
verses.21: “You will be hidden from the scourge of the tongue, And you will not be afraid of violence when it comes.
verses.22: “You will laugh at violence and hunger, And you will not be afraid of wild animals.
verses.23: “For you will be in league with the stones of the field, And the animals of the field will be at peace with you.
verses.24: “You will know that your tent is secure, For you will visit your home and have nothing missing.
verses.25: “You will also know that your descendants will be many, And your offspring as the grass of the earth.
verses.26: “You will come to the grave at a ripe age, Like the stacking of grain in its season.
verses.27: “Behold this; we have investigated it, and so it is. Hear it, and know for yourself.”
